attributes.title: Tactical Map — Drones / Sensors / Operators
attributes.description: Vega-Lite map with three layers: drone positions (circles, colored by state), sensor positions (blue squares), operator positions (yellow triangles)

attributes.title: Drone Roster
attributes.description: Latest status per drone: serial number, UA type, vendor, height, speed, RSSI, trend, bearing, BVLOS, state, dwell

attributes.title: Drone Presence Timeline
attributes.description: Area chart: detection count per drone over time — Gantt-style presence view

attributes.title: Sparrow DroneID — Tactical
attributes.description: Real-time tactical overview: active drone count, alert count, closest drone, max altitude, live map, drone roster, and presence timeline.

attributes.title: Sensor Health Table
attributes.description: Per-sensor: last detection time, total detections in the selected window, unique drones observed, and average RSSI

attributes.title: Detections per Sensor per Hour
attributes.description: Stacked bar: hourly detection count per sensor

attributes.title: Range vs RSSI Scatter
attributes.description: Vega-Lite scatter: range on X, average RSSI on Y, colored by sensor — shows per-sensor RF detection envelope

attributes.title: Sparrow DroneID — Sensor Health
attributes.description: Per-sensor coverage: last detection timestamp, detection volume, unique drones tracked, average RSSI, detections-per-hour chart, and range-vs-RSSI scatter.

attributes.title: Known Drones
attributes.description: Intelligence registry: per-drone detection count, sensors that saw it, first/last seen, and maximum dwell time

attributes.title: Activity Heatmap — Hour of Day vs Day of Week
attributes.description: Vega-Lite heatmap: rows=day of week, columns=hour of day, color=detection count — reveals activity patterns

attributes.title: Protocol Distribution
attributes.description: Donut pie chart: proportion of detections by drone communication protocol

attributes.title: Altitude Class Distribution
attributes.description: Bar chart: detection count by altitude class — GROUND, LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, ILLEGAL

attributes.title: Sparrow DroneID — Intelligence
attributes.description: Historical intelligence: known drone registry, activity heatmap by time-of-week, protocol mix, and altitude class distribution.

attributes.title: Alert Log
attributes.description: Sortable alert log: timestamp, serial number, alert type, alert state, sensor — filtered to event.kind:alert

attributes.title: Alert Type Distribution
attributes.description: Donut pie: proportion of each alert type fired in the selected time window

attributes.title: Alert Volume Over Time
attributes.description: Line chart: alert count per time bucket — shows alert rate spikes

attributes.title: Sparrow DroneID — Alerts
attributes.description: Alert management: unacknowledged count, alert type distribution, alert volume timeline, and sortable alert log filtered to event.kind:alert.
